languages.text: "Эта конструкция преобразует живых существ в субстанцию под названием {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}"твердый свет"{/g}. Это ксеномеханическая мерзость". {n}Воин тщательно сдерживает свой гнев, но ярость прорывается наружу низким рокотом в его голосе.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Эта конструкция преобразует живых существ в субстанцию под названием {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}"жесткий свет"{/g}. Это ксеномеханическая мерзость". {n}Воин тщательно сдерживает свой гнев, но ярость прорывается наружу низким рокотом в его голосе.{/n}

languages.text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Эта конструкция преобразует живых существ в субстанцию под названием {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}"твердый свет"{/g}. Это ксеномеханическая мерзость". {n}Воин тщательно сдерживает свой гнев, но ярость прорывается наружу низким рокотом в его голосе.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}It takes the warrior a great effort to control his anger, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

"This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}
"Xenomechanical abomination! This device transforms the Emperor's creations into something composed of hard light. The victim's entire being is distorted, becoming a dead light copy of itself."

"This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}It takes the warrior a great effort to control his anger, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

"This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

languages.text: 「異種機械の化け物！この装置は皇帝の創造物を硬い光で構成されたものに変える。被害者の存在全体が歪み、死んだ光のコピーとなる」
languages.original_text: "Xenomechanical abomination! This device transforms the Emperor's creations into something composed of hard light. The victim's entire being is distorted, becoming a dead light copy of itself."

traits.locale_text: 「異種機械の abomination！この装置は皇帝の創造物を硬い光で構成されたものに変える。被害者の存在全体が歪み、死んだ光のコピーとなる。」

languages.text: «Este dispositivo transforma a seres vivos en una sustancia llamada {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}luz sólida{/g}. Es una abominación xenomecánica». {n}Aunque el guerrero intenta contener su cólera, se sigue filtrando en el gruñido de su voz.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Este dispositivo transforma a seres vivos en una sustancia llamada {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}luz sólida{/g}. Es una abominación xenomecánica». {n}Aunque el guerrero intenta contener su cólera, se sigue filtrando en el gruñido de su voz.{/n}

languages.text: “这台装置能将活物转化为一种叫{g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}硬光{/g}的物质。真是异形机械的亵渎造物。”{n}那战士极力压抑着怒火，但怒气还是从他那低沉的咆哮中透了出来。{/n}
languages.original_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这台装置能将活物转化为一种叫{g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}硬光{/g}的物质。真是异形机械的亵渎造物。”{n}那战士极力压抑着怒火，但怒气还是从他那低沉的咆哮中透了出来。{/n}

languages.text: "Dieses Gerät verwandelt lebende Wesen in eine Substanz namens {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}Hartlicht{/g}. Es ist eine xenomechanische Abscheulichkeit." {n}Der Krieger zügelt mit großer Mühe seinen Zorn, der sich allerdings als tiefes Grollen in seiner Stimme Bahn bricht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Dieses Gerät verwandelt lebende Wesen in eine Substanz namens {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}Hartlicht{/g}. Es ist eine xenomechanische Abscheulichkeit." {n}Der Krieger zügelt mit großer Mühe seinen Zorn, der sich allerdings als tiefes Grollen in seiner Stimme Bahn bricht.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu cihaz, canlıları {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}katı ışık{/g} adı verilen bir maddeye dönüştürüyor. Zenomekanizma kökenli bir iğrençlik." {n}Savaşçı öfkesini büyük bir çabayla kontrol etse de bu, sesinde derin bir gürleme şeklinde yankı buluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu cihaz, canlıları {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}katı ışık{/g} adı verilen bir maddeye dönüştürüyor. Zenomekanizma kökenli bir iğrençlik." {n}Savaşçı öfkesini büyük bir çabayla kontrol etse de bu, sesinde derin bir gürleme şeklinde yankı buluyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Cet appareil transforme les êtres vivants en une substance nommée {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}lumière solide{/g}. C'est une véritable abomination xénomécanique. » {n}Le guerrier fait de son mieux pour maîtriser sa colère, mais elle transparaît dans sa voix grondante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "This device transforms living beings into a substance called {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}hard light{/g}. It is a xenomechanical abomination." {n}The warrior controls his anger with great effort, but it breaks through as a deep rumble in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Cet appareil transforme les êtres vivants en une substance nommée {g|Encyclopedia:HardLight}lumière solide{/g}. C'est une véritable abomination xénomécanique. » {n}Le guerrier fait de son mieux pour maîtriser sa colère, mais elle transparaît dans sa voix grondante.{/n}
